title: psacalium tussilaginoides
intro: Psacalium tussilaginoides, also known as yerba de la montaña or mountain sage, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Psacalium tussilaginoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Psacalium tussilaginoides can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
